title: peperomia rotundifolia var. obcordata
intro: Peperomia rotundifolia var. obcordata, also known as the 'Nepal Cucumber' or 'Pincushion Peperomia', is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Peperomia plant family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peperomia rotundifolia var. obcordata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions and decoctions, often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
